      have h₁₀ := h₈
      simp_all [h]

    · -- Backward direction: if x_is_neg.val = 1#u8, then x_sign_bit is true
      have h₁₀ := h₈
      simp_all [h]

  · -- Prove (Field51_as_Nat ep.T % p = (Field51_as_Nat ep.X * Field51_as_Nat ep.Y) % p)
    have h₁₀ := h₉
    simp_all
    <;> try norm_num
    <;> try ring_nf at *
    <;> try omega
